cards.back: The process of distributing power and control across a network, rather than concentrating it in a single entity
A mechanism used to validate transactions and achieve consensus among nodes in a blockchain network
A comprehensive system that includes not only blockchain technology but also other components such as mining, nodes, and wallets
A distributed digital ledger that records transactions and data across a network of computers in a secure and transparent way
Various techniques used to achieve decentralization, including peer-to-peer networks, blockchain, and distributed data storage
